narrative:
Wellington Township has 4,026 registered voters, with 59.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.3%, a modest Republican lean of 5.8 percentage points.
